mapper.select: SELECT e.employee_id, e.employee_no, e.employee_name, e.dept_id, d.dept_name, d.dept_code, e.position_id, p.position_name, p.position_code, p.position_level, e.email, e.phone, e.keycloak_user_id, e.hire_date, e.status, e.created_at, e.updated_at FROM platform_v3.org_employee e INNER JOIN platform_v3.org_department d ON e.dept_id = d.dept_id INNER JOIN platform_v3.org_position p ON e.position_id = p.position_id WHERE e.employee_id = #{employeeId}
SELECT employee_id, employee_no, employee_name, dept_id, position_id, email, phone, keycloak_user_id, hire_date, status FROM platform_v3.org_employee WHERE employee_no = #{employeeNo}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO platform_v3.org_employee (employee_no, employee_name, dept_id, position_id, email, phone, keycloak_user_id, hire_date, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{employeeNo}, #{employeeName}, #{deptId}, #{positionId}, #{email}, #{phone}, #{keycloakUserId},
CAST(#{hireDate} AS DATE) CURRENT_DATE , COALESCE(#{status}, 'ACTIVE'), NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE platform_v3.org_employee SET employee_name = #{employeeName}, dept_id = #{deptId}, position_id = #{positionId}, email = #{email}, phone = #{phone}, keycloak_user_id = #{keycloakUserId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE employee_id = #{employeeId}
mapper.select: WITH RECURSIVE dept_tree AS ( SELECT d.dept_id, d.dept_code, d.dept_name, d.parent_dept_id, d.dept_level, d.sort_order, d.use_yn FROM platform_v3.org_department d WHERE d.parent_dept_id IS NULL UNION ALL SELECT c.dept_id, c.dept_code, c.dept_name, c.parent_dept_id, c.dept_level, c.sort_order, c.use_yn FROM platform_v3.org_department c INNER JOIN dept_tree p ON c.parent_dept_id = p.dept_id ) SELECT dept_id, dept_code, dept_name, parent_dept_id, dept_level, sort_order, use_yn FROM dept_tree ORDER BY dept_level, sort_order, dept_name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO platform_v3.org_department (dept_code, dept_name, parent_dept_id, dept_level, sort_order, use_yn, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{deptCode}, #{deptName}, #{parentDeptId}, COALESCE(#{deptLevel}, 1), COALESCE(#{sortOrder}, 0), COALESCE(#{useYn}, 'Y'), NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE platform_v3.org_department SET dept_code = #{deptCode}, dept_name = #{deptName}, parent_dept_id = #{parentDeptId}, dept_level = COALESCE(#{deptLevel}, dept_level), sort_order = COALESCE(#{sortOrder}, sort_order), use_yn = COALESCE(#{useYn}, use_yn), updated_at = NOW() WHERE dept_id = #{deptId}
mapper.select: SELECT menu_id, menu_name, menu_path, parent_menu_id, menu_level, sort_order, icon, use_yn, created_at FROM platform_v3.cm_menu ORDER BY menu_level, sort_order, menu_id
SELECT menu_id, menu_name, menu_path, parent_menu_id, menu_level, sort_order, icon, use_yn FROM platform_v3.cm_menu WHERE menu_id = #{menuId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO platform_v3.cm_menu (menu_id, menu_name, menu_path, parent_menu_id, menu_level, sort_order, icon, use_yn, created_at) VALUES (#{menuId}, #{menuName}, #{menuPath}, #{parentMenuId}, COALESCE(#{menuLevel}, 1), COALESCE(#{sortOrder}, 0), #{icon}, COALESCE(#{useYn}, 'Y'), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE platform_v3.cm_menu SET menu_name = #{menuName}, menu_path = #{menuPath}, parent_menu_id = #{parentMenuId}, menu_level = COALESCE(#{menuLevel}, menu_level), sort_order = COALESCE(#{sortOrder}, sort_order), icon = #{icon}, use_yn = COALESCE(#{useYn}, use_yn) WHERE menu_id = #{menuId}
mapper.select: SELECT rm.role_id, rm.menu_id, m.menu_name, rm.can_read, rm.can_create, rm.can_update, rm.can_delete, rm.can_export, rm.can_print FROM platform_v3.cm_role_menu rm INNER JOIN platform_v3.cm_menu m ON m.menu_id = rm.menu_id ORDER BY rm.role_id, m.menu_level, m.sort_order
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM platform_v3.cm_role_menu WHERE role_id = #{roleId} AND menu_id = #{menuId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO platform_v3.cm_role_menu (role_id, menu_id, can_read, can_create, can_update, can_delete, can_export, can_print) VALUES (#{roleId}, #{menuId}, COALESCE(#{canRead}, FALSE), COALESCE(#{canCreate}, FALSE), COALESCE(#{canUpdate}, FALSE), COALESCE(#{canDelete}, FALSE), COALESCE(#{canExport}, FALSE), COALESCE(#{canPrint}, FALSE)) ON CONFLICT (role_id, menu_id) DO UPDATE SET can_read = EXCLUDED.can_read, can_create = EXCLUDED.can_create, can_update = EXCLUDED.can_update, can_delete = EXCLUDED.can_delete, can_export = EXCLUDED.can_export, can_print = EXCLUDED.can_print
mapper.select: SELECT role_id, role_name, description FROM platform_v3.cm_role ORDER BY role_id
SELECT group_cd, COUNT(*) AS code_count FROM platform_v3.cm_code GROUP BY group_cd ORDER BY group_cd
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO platform_v3.cm_code (group_cd, code, code_name, sort_order, use_yn, created_at) VALUES (#{groupCd}, #{code}, #{codeName}, COALESCE(#{sortOrder}, 0), COALESCE(#{useYn}, 'Y'), NOW()) ON CONFLICT (group_cd, code) DO UPDATE SET code_name = EXCLUDED.code_name, sort_order = EXCLUDED.sort_order, use_yn = EXCLUDED.use_yn
mapper.update: UPDATE platform_v3.cm_code SET code_name = #{codeName}, sort_order = COALESCE(#{sortOrder}, sort_order), use_yn = COALESCE(#{useYn}, use_yn) WHERE group_cd = #{groupCd} AND code = #{code}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM platform_v3.cm_code WHERE group_cd = #{groupCd} AND code = #{code}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO platform_v3.sa_audit (actor_no, actor_name, action, target_type, target_id, before_json, after_json, ip_addr, acted_at) VALUES (#{actorNo}, #{actorName}, #{action}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, CAST(#{beforeJson} AS JSONB), CAST(#{afterJson} AS JSONB), #{ipAddr}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT audit_id, actor_no, actor_name, action, target_type, target_id, before_json, after_json, ip_addr, acted_at FROM platform_v3.sa_audit WHERE 1=1 AND actor_no = #{actorNo} AND action LIKE '%' || #{action} || '%' AND acted_at >= CAST(#{fromDate} AS TIMESTAMPTZ) AND acted_at < (CAST(#{toDate} AS DATE) + INTERVAL '1 day') ORDER BY acted_at DESC OFFSET #{offset} LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM platform_v3.sa_audit WHERE 1=1 AND actor_no = #{actorNo} AND action LIKE '%' || #{action} || '%' AND acted_at >= CAST(#{fromDate} AS TIMESTAMPTZ) AND acted_at < (CAST(#{toDate} AS DATE) + INTERVAL '1 day')
